task_description: Fix 6 bugs in MK OS: natural language math detection, greeting fallback showing LLM error, thinking engine wasting API calls on greetings, useless low-confidence phrases, provider routing preferring dead OpenRouter over working Groq, and smart router matching 'time' inside 'times'

verification.summary: Build succeeds with 0 errors. All 67 tests pass (484 assertions). Interactive verification confirms: 'hello' produces casual greeting, '5 times 3' returns 15, '10 divided by 2' returns 5.
